headline: Agoda and DTTDC Launch MoU to Position Delhi as a Year-Round Destination
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has announced a strategic partnership with the Delhi Tourism & Transportation Development Corporation (DTTDC) and Government of NCT of Delhi, aimed at positioning Delhi as a leading year-round tourist destination. The Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was exchanged at the Tourism Stakeholders Conference, "Delhi: From Transit to Destination," held at The Ashok Hotel, New Delhi, on 2 May 2026.

headline: Agoda Reveals the Most Popular Search Filters for 2026: Asian Travelers Favour Choice, Culinary Convenience and Comfort
summary: Digital travel platform Agoda has unveiled its ranking of what Asian travelers prioritize most when searching for accommodation in 2026. Looking at the most-used search filters on its website this year, Agoda reports that Asian travelers consistently prioritizing accommodation type, included breakfasts and strong review scores when seeking holiday stays.

headline: BKNG Ads Launch Puts Booking Holdings Valuation And Growth In Focus
summary: Booking Holdings (NasdaqGS:BKNG) has introduced "BKNG Ads", a unified advertising platform serving Booking.com, Priceline, and Agoda. The new platform brings together advertising solutions across the company’s major travel brands to support partners’ campaign planning and activation. Booking Holdings operates some of the largest online travel platforms globally, giving it access to a wide base of travelers and accommodation partners.
